product: The Discover page is now in Public Preview ​
tagline: June 22, 2026 The [Discover page](/aws/en/discover/discover page) is now in Public Preview.
what_it_does: June 22, 2026 The [Discover page](/aws/en/discover/discover page) is now in Public Preview. Discover is a curated browsing experience that helps users find data assets governed by Unity Catalog without requiring deep knowledge of catalog hierarchies.
why_it_matters: Discover is a curated browsing experience that helps users find data assets governed by Unity Catalog without requiring deep knowledge of catalog hierarchies.
